title: Et Rex
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Rex}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Etrex.jpg]] |name=Et Rex |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{StoryCite|story=Poison Moon (comic story)|book=Dark Horse Extra|bformatted=''Dark Horse Extra'' 44–47}} |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Green]] |skin=Light blue |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Are you ''Et Rex'', the Jedi to be judged before the Council? Did you kill this ship's crew?''"
"''I was to be judged, but I ''haven't'' killed anyone! I've been framed!|Obi-Wan Kenobi and Et Rex|}} '''Et Rex''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], Rex was framed for crimes that he did not commit by his friend and fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Knight [[Alysun Celz]], who had fallen to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. As he was being taken back to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to stand trial, the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Radiant IX]]'' crashed on the [[Poison Moon/Legends|Poison Moon]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]]. Rex escaped to the asteroid's surface as Celz, now a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], proceeded to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the ship's crew. When Jedi Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], investigated the crash, Rex eventually met with Kenobi as Skywalker stayed aboard the ''Radiant IX'' with Celz. Rex persuaded the Knight that Celz had fallen to the dark side and helped Kenobi [[Skirmish on the Poison Moon|incapacitate]] Celz, who was [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] Skywalker with [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]]. Rex went back with Kenobi and Skywalker to the Jedi Council, with Celz as their [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|When she fell to the dark side, I wouldn't follow her. I never imagined it would end up like this!''"
"''She…? You mean…''"
"''Alysun. Yes…she's the ''killer''.|Rex and Kenobi|}} [[File:Alysun.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Alysun Celz framed Et Rex for crimes she committed after falling to the dark side.]] Et Rex, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] belonging to a [[Species/Legends|species]] of anthropomorphic [[Bird/Legends|avians]] with cranial horns, was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and eventually [[Jedi Trials/Legends|ascended]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. During this [[Time/Legends|time]] he formed a friendship with a [[Human/Legends|Human]] female [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]{{CSWECite|I|115|Celz, Alysun}} named [[Alysun Celz]]. In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], Celz, who had fallen to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], framed Rex for crimes that she committed. He became Celz's [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] and was being brought to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], aboard the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] ''[[Radiant IX]]'' to stand trial for the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi's]] crimes. However, the ''Radiant IX''{{'s}} exterior [[Power coupling/Legends|power couplings]] were sabotaged by a flock of [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]], causing the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] to crash on an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] known as the [[Poison Moon/Legends|Poison Moon]] in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system's]] [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]]. Rex managed to escape the vessel and head to the asteroid's surface as Celz turned against the ship's crew by [[Death/Legends|killing]] them with [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]]. When the ''Radiant IX'' did not arrive at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], the High Council dispatched Jedi Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], to search for and detain Rex. When they discovered the wrecked cruiser in the [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]], the Jedi searched the body-littered ship for signs of life and soon located Celz, who deceived Kenobi and Skywalker into believing that Rex had slain the ship's crew. Rex encountered Kenobi as the former was investigating the cause of the ''Radiant IX''{{'s}} crash. The framed Jedi convinced Kenobi that he was innocent of the charges levied against him, revealing that it was Celz who had committed the crimes and murdered the crew. Rex returned to the ''Radiant IX'' with Kenobi, finding Celz—who intended to steal Kenobi's vessel—[[Torture/Legends|torturing]] Skywalker with Force lightning. Kenobi tried to [[Skirmish on the Poison Moon|intervene]] but was also thwarted by the Dark Jedi's attack. Rex rescued Kenobi and Skywalker by hurling a couple of mynocks he had at Celz, which distracted his former friend and caused her to [[Stun/Legends|stun]] herself until she was incapacitated. Rex helped Kenobi and Skywalker detain the woman, and he accompanied them and the imprisoned Celz back to Coruscant. ==Personality and traits== [[File:Mynock_attack.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Rex used two mynocks to disable Celz.]] {{Quote|Sweetheart! I brought you something!|Rex, to Celz, before throwing the second mynock that would incapacitate her|}} Rex did not require a [[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]] when he went on the surface of the Poison Moon asteroid. He wore [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]] and carried a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. When Celz fell to the dark side, Rex refused to join her, and as a result she framed him for her crimes. He maintained his innocence to Kenobi and was willing to assist in detaining Celz, although he did so without wounding her fatally. ==Powers and abilities== Rex was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitive]] to the Force and eventually ascended to the rank of Jedi Knight. He was able to defeat Celz by using the mynocks that were in his [[Limb/Legends|hands]], despite his former friend unleashing bolts of Force lightning. ==Behind the scenes== Et Rex was created by [[Michael Carriglitto]] for the short story "[[Poison Moon (comic story)|Poison Moon]]," which appeared in issues 44–47 of the ''[[Dark Horse Extra]]'', a series of monthly four-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] anthologies. Issues 44–47 were published from [[February]] to [[May]] [[2002]], with the art being provided by [[Adrian Sibar]]. Rex garnered an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]]. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Poison Moon (comic story)|book=Dark Horse Extra|bformatted=''Dark Horse Extra'' 44–47}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Et Rex |pl=Et Rex }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Rex, Et}} [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Knights]]
